'''fafada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaleling|whaleling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaleling|whaleling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fafada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfædæth|fæfædæth]] || [[word:fæfædæj|fæfædæj]] || [[word:fæfædæsh|fæfædæsh]] || [[word:fæfædæ|fæfædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafafadath|fafafadath]] || [[word:fafafadaj|fafafadaj]] || [[word:fafafadash|fafafadash]] || [[word:fafafada|fafafada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafadath|fafadath]] || [[word:fafadaj|fafadaj]] || [[word:fafadash|fafadash]] || [[word:fafada|fafada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafafdath|fafafdath]] || [[word:fafafdaj|fafafdaj]] || [[word:fafafdash|fafafdash]] || [[word:fafafdaf|fafafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafadatha|fafadatha]] || [[word:fafadaja|fafadaja]] || [[word:fafadasha|fafadasha]] || [[word:fafadaka|fafadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafadath|fafadath]] || [[word:fafadaj|fafadaj]] || [[word:fafadash|fafadash]] || [[word:fafada|fafada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafadathal|fafadathal]] || [[word:fafadajal|fafadajal]] || [[word:fafadashal|fafadashal]] || [[word:fafadakal|fafadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafadathatha|fafadathatha]] || [[word:fafadajaja|fafadajaja]] || [[word:fafadashasha|fafadashasha]] || [[word:fafadaka|fafadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafadathan|fafadathan]] || [[word:fafadajan|fafadajan]] || [[word:fafadashan|fafadashan]] || [[word:fafadakan|fafadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafadathaoro|fafadathaoro]] || [[word:fafadajaoro|fafadajaoro]] || [[word:fafadashaoro|fafadashaoro]] || [[word:fafadakaoro|fafadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
